macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Liquidations Reach $257 Million in 24 Hours, Longs Hit Hardest
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw $257 million in liquidations over the past 24 hours, with $163 million from long positions and $93.82 million from shorts; Bitcoin and Ethereum led with $55.59 million and $43.59 million respectively, affecting 129,536 traders.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Files for Bitcoin ETF with Yield-Focused Strategy
items.summary: Goldman Sachs applied for its first crypto ETF on April 14, proposing a fund that holds spot Bitcoin ETFs from other issuers, designed to generate income in normal or sideways markets with capped upside in rallies.

items.title: Kraken Advances Confidential IPO Filing Despite Valuation Slide
items.summary: Kraken is proceeding with its confidential IPO filing submitted to the SEC in November 2025, as confirmed by Co-CEO Arjun Sethi, even amid a recent drop in corporate valuation.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Near $75,000 Amid ETF Inflows and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin traded around $75,000, supported by ETF inflows, while markets monitored U.S.-Iran conflict developments; Ethereum also gained as stocks hit record highs.

items.title: XRP and Solana Post Gains; XRP at $1.40 Up 2.9%, Solana at $85.51 Up 1.8%
items.summary: XRP rose 2.9% to $1.40 and Solana increased 1.8% to $85.51 over 24 hours, while Bitcoin was up 0.9% to $75,049.79 amid stable market conditions.

items.title: Bitcoin Fails to Break $75,000 Despite Stock Market Records
items.summary: Bitcoin traded around $75,134, up 1.45% over 24 hours, but failed to surpass $75,000 even as Nasdaq and S&P 500 hit new highs.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Shows Signs of Performance Degradation
items.summary: BridgeBench reports a 15-point accuracy drop on hallucination benchmarks for Claude Opus 4.6, while AMD's Senior AI Director found median thinking collapsed from ~2,200 to ~600 characters between January and March.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Managed Agents in Public Beta
items.summary: Anthropic released Claude Managed Agents to public beta and expanded its partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of compute, with the company's run rate reportedly jumping from ~$9B to $30B in four months.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude for Word and Claude Mythos Preview
items.summary: Anthropic launched Claude for Word and shared details on Claude Mythos Preview, with speculation that it's a looped language model based on a ByteDance paper.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: Wispr Flow Raises $81M at $700M Valuation
items.summary: Wispr Flow, a voice-to-text software company, raised $81M at a $700M valuation and is experiencing 30-50% month-over-month growth as one of Silicon Valley's fastest-growing AI startups.

items.title: Ramp Labs Releases Latent Briefing Paper on Multi-Agent Token Savings
items.summary: Ramp Labs published a Latent Briefing paper demonstrating 31% token savings for multi-agent systems, contributing to efficiency improvements in AI infrastructure.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: Scale AI's Muse Spark Model Powers Meta AI
items.summary: Scale AI's Muse Spark model is now powering Meta AI applications, expanding the deployment of advanced AI models across major tech platforms.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: MiniMax Releases MMX CLI and Open-Sources M2.7
items.summary: MiniMax shipped MMX CLI and open-sourced M2.7, while GLM-5.1 broke into Code Arena's top 3 rankings.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

items.title: Widespread Benchmark Cheating Exposed Across Nine Agent Benchmarks
items.summary: Investigation reveals systematic benchmark cheating across nine agent benchmarks, raising concerns about the reliability of AI model performance metrics.
items.source: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Dolphin Emulator Launches Dolphin XR Fork for VR Gaming
items.summary: A new fork of the Dolphin emulator called Dolphin XR is in active development, bringing significant upgrades for virtual reality emulation of retro games. This development highlights the ongoing resurgence of retro gaming in VR.

items.title: Highly Anticipated Pirate Game Enters Early Access
items.summary: The best pirate game, previously demoed, has officially launched in early access, generating excitement among players and streamers. Early feedback praises its potential following demo playthroughs.

items.title: Marvel Snap Player Achieves 77% Winrate with Archangel Deck in High Infinite
items.summary: A Marvel Snap player details a high-performing Archangel deck achieving a 77% winrate in High Infinite ranks, analyzing key strategies and what truly drives success. The deck build is shared for community use.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
